name: xenv
systemHint: You have access to nested X11 environments through the `xenv` CLI tool (source at ~/Workspace/Exocortex/external-tools/xenv-cli). Run `xenv -h` for usage reference. The environment's window manager is a fork of dwm that you can find in ~/Config/dwm check ~/Config/dwm/config.h for keybinds if you need to open new tags, delete windows, etc...
